claim: No 13-vertex regular tournament has every vertex non-strong Seymour
consequence_with_paper_theorem: Every oriented graph on at most 13 vertices has a strong Seymour vertex

encoding.branch_parameter: p = number of left-side vertices in a size-5 cover for root vertex 0

limitations: not a proof of the conjecture for arbitrary order
the graph-theoretic conclusion relies on the reduction and CNF generator
